name: S-4 --include-gaps lists every catalog source with zero citing rules under a Gaps heading per the gap analyzer
command:
printf -- '- id: covered
  fetch_frequency: daily
- id: gap-source
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > cat.yaml && mkdir -p tree/c && printf 'source:
  id: covered
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: covered}]}
' > tree/c/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit r.md --catalog cat.yaml --tree tree --include-gaps && grep -q '### Gaps' r.md && grep -q 'gap-source: zero citing rules' r.md && echo gapped 1>&2
